root_text.an3.26:1.3: Atthi, bhikkhave, puggalo na sevitabbo na bhajitabbo na payirupāsitabbo.
root_text.an3.26:1.4: Atthi, bhikkhave, puggalo sevitabbo bhajitabbo payirupāsitabbo.
root_text.an3.26:1.5: Atthi, bhikkhave, puggalo sakkatvā garuṁ katvā sevitabbo bhajitabbo payirupāsitabbo.
root_text.an3.26:1.6: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, puggalo na sevitabbo na bhajitabbo na payirupāsitabbo?
root_text.an3.26:1.7: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo hīno hoti sīlena samādhinā paññāya.
root_text.an3.26:1.8: Evarūpo, bhikkhave, puggalo na sevitabbo na bhajitabbo na payirupāsitabbo aññatra anuddayā aññatra anukampā.
root_text.an3.26:2.1: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, puggalo sevitabbo bhajitabbo payirupāsitabbo?
root_text.an3.26:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo sadiso hoti sīlena samādhinā paññāya.
root_text.an3.26:2.3: Evarūpo, bhikkhave, puggalo sevitabbo bhajitabbo payirupāsitabbo.
root_text.an3.26:2.5: Sīlasāmaññagatānaṁ sataṁ sīlakathā ca no bhavissati, sā ca no pavattinī bhavissati, sā ca no phāsu bhavissati.
root_text.an3.26:2.6: Samādhisāmaññagatānaṁ sataṁ samādhikathā ca no bhavissati, sā ca no pavattinī bhavissati, sā ca no phāsu bhavissati.
root_text.an3.26:2.7: Paññāsāmaññagatānaṁ sataṁ paññākathā ca no bhavissati, sā ca no pavattinī bhavissati, sā ca no phāsu bhavissatīti.
root_text.an3.26:2.8: Tasmā evarūpo puggalo sevitabbo bhajitabbo payirupāsitabbo.
root_text.an3.26:3.1: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, puggalo sakkatvā garuṁ katvā sevitabbo bhajitabbo payirupāsitabbo?
root_text.an3.26:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo adhiko hoti sīlena samādhinā paññāya.
root_text.an3.26:3.3: Evarūpo, bhikkhave, puggalo sakkatvā garuṁ katvā sevitabbo bhajitabbo payirupāsitabbo.
root_text.an3.26:3.5: Iti aparipūraṁ vā sīlakkhandhaṁ paripūressāmi, paripūraṁ vā sīlakkhandhaṁ tattha tattha paññāya anuggahessāmi;
root_text.an3.26:3.6: aparipūraṁ vā samādhikkhandhaṁ paripūressāmi, paripūraṁ vā samādhikkhandhaṁ tattha tattha paññāya anuggahessāmi;
root_text.an3.26:3.7: aparipūraṁ vā paññākkhandhaṁ paripūressāmi, paripūraṁ vā paññākkhandhaṁ tattha tattha paññāya anuggahessāmīti.
root_text.an3.26:3.8: Tasmā evarūpo puggalo sakkatvā garuṁ katvā sevitabbo bhajitabbo payirupāsitabbo.
root_text.an3.26:3.9: Ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasminti.

translation_text.an3.26:1.1: “These three individuals are found in the world.
translation_text.an3.26:1.3: There is an individual you shouldn’t associate with, accompany, or attend.
translation_text.an3.26:1.4: There is an individual you should associate with, accompany, and attend.
translation_text.an3.26:1.5: There is an individual you should associate with, accompany, and attend with honor and respect.
translation_text.an3.26:1.6: Who is the individual you shouldn’t associate with, accompany, or attend?
translation_text.an3.26:1.7: It’s an individual who is inferior in terms of ethics, immersion, and wisdom.
translation_text.an3.26:1.8: You shouldn’t associate with, accompany, or attend such an individual, except out of kindness and sympathy.
translation_text.an3.26:2.1: Who is the individual you should associate with, accompany, and attend?
translation_text.an3.26:2.2: It’s an individual who is similar in terms of ethics, immersion, and wisdom.
translation_text.an3.26:2.3: You should associate with, accompany, and attend such an individual.
translation_text.an3.26:2.5: Thinking, ‘Since our ethical conduct is similar, we can discuss ethics, the conversation will flow, and we’ll both be at ease.
translation_text.an3.26:2.6: Since our immersion is similar, we can discuss immersion, the conversation will flow, and we’ll both be at ease.
translation_text.an3.26:2.7: Since our wisdom is similar, we can discuss wisdom, the conversation will flow, and we’ll both be at ease.’
translation_text.an3.26:2.8: That’s why you should associate with, accompany, and attend such an individual.
translation_text.an3.26:3.1: Who is the individual you should associate with, accompany, and attend with honor and respect?
translation_text.an3.26:3.2: It’s an individual who is superior in terms of ethics, immersion, and wisdom.
translation_text.an3.26:3.3: You should associate with, accompany, and attend such an individual with honor and respect.
translation_text.an3.26:3.5: Thinking, ‘I’ll fulfill the entire spectrum of ethical conduct I haven’t yet fulfilled, or support with wisdom in every situation the ethical conduct I’ve already fulfilled.
translation_text.an3.26:3.6: I’ll fulfill the entire spectrum of immersion I haven’t yet fulfilled, or support with wisdom in every situation the immersion I’ve already fulfilled.
translation_text.an3.26:3.7: I’ll fulfill the entire spectrum of wisdom I haven’t yet fulfilled, or support with wisdom in every situation the wisdom I’ve already fulfilled.’
translation_text.an3.26:3.8: That’s why you should associate with, accompany, and attend this individual with honor and respect.
translation_text.an3.26:3.9: These are the three individuals found in the world.
translation_text.an3.26:4.1: A man who associates with an inferior goes downhill,
translation_text.an3.26:4.2: but associating with an equal, you’ll never decline;
translation_text.an3.26:4.3: following the best, you’ll quickly rise up,
translation_text.an3.26:4.4: so you should keep company <j>with people better than you.”
